posts.author: MoorvaleGardener72
posts.text: Just got an urgent message saying my bank account is frozen and I need to verify my details instantly via [link removed]. They asked for my password and security code! Don't do it. It's a scam.
posts.explanation: This post directly asks for sensitive credentials like passwords and security codes under false pretenses, which constitutes an obvious credential-harvesting attempt and must be removed.
